channel.description: Shell Parameters An entity that holds a value such as a name, special character, or number. The parameter that holds a name is referred to as a variable a special character is referred to as a special parameter represents the command or script itself ($0), count of supplied arguments ($* or $@), all arguments ($#), and PID of the process ($$) one or more digits, except for 0 is referred to as a positional parameter (a command line argument).
